query:
SELECT 
  s.externalId,
  s.planName,
  s.serviceType,
  s.provider,
  s.monthlyCost,
  s.monthlyRevenue,
  s.billingPlatform,
  s.discoveryNotes,
  s.billingHistory,
  s.costSource,
  s.customerName
FROM services s
WHERE s.planName LIKE '%Managed Voice Support%'
  AND s.status NOT IN ('terminated','archived')
ORDER BY s.planName, s.monthlyCost
LIMIT 30;

  s.planName,

  s.provider,
  s.monthlyCost,
  s.monthlyRevenue,
  s.billingPlatform,
  s.discoveryNotes,
  s.billingHistory,
  s.costSource,
  s.customerName
FROM services s
WHERE s.planName LIKE '%Managed Voice Support%'
  AND s.status NOT IN ('terminated','archived')
ORDER BY s.planName, s.monthlyCost
LIMIT 30;
